name: Python & Node.js Development
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y shfmt shellcheck && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install flake8==7.1.1 black==24.8.0 isort==5.13.2 pytest==8.3.3 httpx==0.27.2 pydantic==2.9.2 && npm install -g markdownlint-cli && if [ -f "${localWorkspaceFolder}/package.json" ]; then cd "${localWorkspaceFolder}" && npm install; fi && if [ -f "${localWorkspaceFolder}/Cargo.toml" ]; then cd "${localWorkspaceFolder}" && cargo build; fi && set -a && . "${localWorkspaceFolder}/.env" && git config --global user.name "$GIT_USER_NAME" && git config --global user.email "$GIT_USER_EMAIL" && mkdir -p ~/.ssh && echo "$GIT_SSH_KEY" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa && chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa && ssh-keyscan github.com >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts && cd "${localWorkspaceFolder}" && if [ ! -d .git ]; then git init && git checkout -b "$MAIN_BRANCH" && echo "$REPO_SUBFOLDER/" > .gitignore && echo ".env" >> .gitignore && git add .gitignore && git commit -m "Initial commit with .gitignore" && git remote add origin "git@github.com:oleg1203/AI-SYSTEMS.git" && git push -u origin "$MAIN_BRANCH"; else git checkout "$MAIN_BRANCH" || git checkout -b "$MAIN_BRANCH"; fi && mkdir -p "${localWorkspaceFolder}/$REPO_SUBFOLDER/$GAME_SUBFOLDER" && cd "${localWorkspaceFolder}/$REPO_SUBFOLDER/$GAME_SUBFOLDER" && if [ ! -d .git ]; then git init && git checkout -b "$GAME_BRANCH" && echo 'Initial game files version control' > README.md && git add README.md && git commit -m "Initial commit for game files"; fi && echo 'Setup completed successfully'
